recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: Anamorph
recommendations.overview: A detective must solve the case of a serial killer who enacts anamorphosis, a painting technique that manipulates the laws of perspective, only with human bodies.

recommendations.title: Tightrope
recommendations.overview: Wes Block is a detective who's put on the case of a serial killer whose victims are young and pretty women. The murders are getting personal when the killer chooses victims who are acquaintances of Block. Even his daughters are threatened.

recommendations.title: Death Note: L Change the WorLd
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: "The human whose name is written in the Death Note shall die." After making the hardest decision ever, another serious case confronts L. There are only 23 days left and without his best partner Watari, L has to solve the case all by himself for the v

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: 24 Hours to Live
recommendations.overview: An assassin seeks redemption after being given a second chance at life.

recommendations.title: Charlie Countryman
recommendations.overview: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

recommendations.title: Gleaming the Cube
recommendations.overview: An Orange County teenager's carefree life of ditching class and skateboarding abandoned pools comes to a screeching halt when someone close to him dies. The cops rule the death a suicide, but the bereaved skater believes he was murdered. It's up to h

recommendations.title: Split Second
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Crime, Thriller, Horror
recommendations.overview: In a flooded future London, Detective Harley Stone hunts a serial killer who murdered his partner and has haunted him ever since — but he soon discovers what he is hunting might not be human.

recommendations.title: Southland Tales
